headline: Is It Too Late To Consider PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) After Its 1-Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether PNC Financial Services Group still represents good value after a strong run in its share price, or whether the easier gains are already behind it. Over the past year, the stock has recorded returns of 1.7% over 7 days, 11.5% over 30 days, 6.3% year to date, 52.5% over 1 year, 104.4% over 3 years, and 51.5% over 5 years. These figures raise fair questions about how much of its potential is already reflected in the current US$224.81 share price. Recent news...
